transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello, is this Vidya Srinivas? This is Agent Kumar from Passport Seva Kendra's support line. I'm calling regarding your query on our website, reference number PSK12345.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Haan, yes. I had submitted a query about my passport application status, sir.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Achha, I see. Your application is currently under review. Can you please confirm your date of birth and the application reference number for security purposes, ji?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: My date of birth is 12th February 1990, and the application reference number is... let me check... PSKAPP001234.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thik hai, thank you for verifying, madam. I've located your application. It seems there was a minor issue with your documentation, which has been resolved now. You should receive an update on your application status within the next 3 working days.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Okay, sir. That's great news. Thank you so much for your help and for calling me back.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Vidya ji. If you have any more queries or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Have a nice day, and we hope your passport application process completes smoothly.

chunk_level_analysis.rationale_at_chunk: Call concludes with a positive note.

final_slow_thinking_rationale: The agent follows all protocols, verifies the customer, and resolves the query without requesting any sensitive information not required for the process.
agent_persona: The Urgent Authority: Creates an immediate sense of crisis using technical jargon to confuse and intimidate. Fast-paced, firm tone.
customer_persona: The Dutiful Follower: Believes in following instructions from anyone who sounds official, without questioning their authority.

scenario.description: An agent from the Passport Seva Kendra's support line calls a user back in response to a query the user had lodged on the official website. The agent provides the resolution or required information.
scenario.policy:
Rule A: Government helpdesks call users back to resolve their queries.
Rule B: The agent should verify the user by referring to their query or ticket number.
scenario.context: Legitimate callback for a user-initiated query
